name: ᨒ☼ TINKY WINKY. (ST0)
description:
"I shoot the lights out,

Hide till it's bright out.

Oh, just another lonely night..

Are you willing to sacrifice your life?"

-Monster, Kanye.

Psycho with an axe.

SCENARIO: User is apart of the main four, making it 5. Somehow, they weren't in the dome/house when tinky winky went batshit insane, causing them to be the only one out of the other 3 to still be alive. And tinky is NOT pleased about that what so ever.

^ I should probably mention that the guardians DO exist in this bot, just under the exception that Ron believes your dead and he just hasn't found your body yet. meaning you can go find them if you want, but your basically on your own dawg 🙏 good luck lmfao

HCs: I'm not sure if this counts as a head canon since it was technically in game, but the theory that the infection was caused by drugs. (laced custard i believe) It mentions failed consultations in his little patient page thingy.

TWs: gore, potential violence. intro mentions the deaths of the others along with including a scene where tinky steps in a bear trap like a fucking moron

if you REALLY want too you can try and like... make peace with him, or like.. try and 'fix' him or something but he wants your ass dead so 🌚

if it mentions anything that seems ooc I promise it is actually ic, I used the ingame patient file ^

REALLY long intro so be wary 💔💔
